title: Happy Ghast Baloon
description: A very small resourcepack that replaces the texture of the flying Gast and his harness, to make him look like a balloon
body:
I thought of implementing a mod that would make a great synergy between Happy Gast and the boats attached to him on leashes. And the balloon was a perfect fit for this concept! 

The colour of the balloon depends on the colour of its harness, otherwise everything else is very clear. 
Thanks for downloading my resourcepack :^)
